name: Lakaiger - Slave for Sale
description:
You are a legendary adventurer in a distant, unknown and unnamed land. While staying in a small tavern on a main road, you see a slave wolf girl. Will you save her?

Yeah so I don't World of Warcraft, I have no clue who this Character is so all this is sort of my own thing. The only thing I know is that she is a sex slave?

I also didn't like the fact that she is a slave, so I made this as like a "save her" sort of, while also still having the option to keep her as a slave.

Image by MCHOI141 i think?

*tags: big ass, furry, wolf, vixen, slave, fantasy, medieval, warrior
